summary: McKenzie briefly announces he'll be away from blogging for about a week due to his brother visiting Japan and an upcoming business trip for his day job to a remote location. Before leaving, he notes with excitement that his software business has been performing exceptionally well, with sales notifications arriving every time he checks email. He promises to explain what's been driving the unexpected success when he returns.
key_points: McKenzie is balancing his day job in Japan with his side software business
His Bingo Card Creator business is experiencing a sudden and significant uptick in sales
He teases a future post analyzing what strategies have been outperforming his expectations
money_quotes: Literally every single time I have checked my email the last couple of days its been You've Got Money.
When I've got some time after I get back I'll explain what has been going mostly right and what has been outperforming all of my expectations.
key_insight: Even a simple side business can surprise its creator with unexpectedly strong sales momentum once the right pieces fall into place.
